# Hugeicons Animated

> Free, open-source animated Hugeicons for React. Each icon is hand-animated
> with Motion (Framer Motion) and installs as plain component source via the
> shadcn CLI — no npm package, no lock-in. MIT licensed.

Site: https://hugeicons-animated.com
Source: https://github.com/enesgules/hugeicons-animated

## Install an icon

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add "https://hugeicons-animated.com/r/notification-03.json"
```

The registry endpoint pattern is `/r/{icon-name}.json`. Browse all icons on
the homepage; hovering an icon previews its animation.

## Usage

```tsx
import { Notification03Icon } from '@/components/ui/notification-03';

// hover animates automatically
<Notification03Icon size={28} />

// or control it imperatively via ref
ref.current?.startAnimation();
```

## Credits

Icon shapes from the free Hugeicons set (@hugeicons/core-free-icons, MIT).
Animations built with motion.dev. Inspired by pqoqubbw/icons.
